LanguageData.VFET_BreathOfTheAncients.label: Breath of the Ancients
LanguageData.VFET_CharismaticEnclave.description: Social impact of all colonists is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_CharismaticEnclave.label: Charismatic Enclave
LanguageData.VFET_ChemistsOfEfficacy.description: The speed of drug synthesis is 15% faster.
LanguageData.VFET_ChemistsOfEfficacy.label: Chemists of Efficacy
LanguageData.VFET_ChildrenOfTheScorchingSun.descripti: Comfortable maximum temperature is 5 degrees higher.
LanguageData.VFET_ChildrenOfTheScorchingSun.label: Children of the Scorching Sun
LanguageData.VFET_CreedOfTheStoic.description: Pain threshold, at which colonists go unconscious due to pain, is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_CreedOfTheStoic.label: Creed of the Stoic
LanguageData.VFET_CulinaryConnoisseurs.description: Chances of causing food poisoning are reduced by 20%.
LanguageData.VFET_CulinaryConnoisseurs.label: Culinary Connoisseurs
LanguageData.VFET_CultOfInnerStrength.description: People are more resilient and their mental break threshold is decreased by 5%.
LanguageData.VFET_CultOfInnerStrength.label: Cult of Inner Strength
LanguageData.VFET_CustodiansOfPurity.label: Custodians of Purity
LanguageData.VFET_DancersOfTheBattlefield.description: Chance to dodge a melee attack is improved by 5%.
LanguageData.VFET_DancersOfTheBattlefield.label: Dancers of the Battlefield
LanguageData.VFET_DevotedMiners.label: Devoted Miners
LanguageData.VFET_DiligentDoers.description: The speed of unskilled labor tasks is 10% faster.
LanguageData.VFET_DiligentDoers.label: Diligent Doers
LanguageData.VFET_DiplomatsOfSilverTongue.label: Diplomats of Silver Tongue
LanguageData.VFET_DisciplesOfCleanliness.description: Filth produced by people is reduced by 25%.
LanguageData.VFET_DisciplesOfCleanliness.label: Disciples of Cleanliness
LanguageData.VFET_EmbraceOfTheNight.description: Rest while sleeping is gained 10% faster.
LanguageData.VFET_EmbraceOfTheNight.label: Embrace of the Night
LanguageData.VFET_FollowersOfTheHealingWaters.descrip: Immunity to diseases is gained 10% faster.
LanguageData.VFET_FollowersOfTheHealingWaters.label: Followers of the Healing Waters
LanguageData.VFET_GuildOfDiligence.description: Global work speed is increased by 5%.
LanguageData.VFET_GuildOfDiligence.label: Guild of Diligence
LanguageData.VFET_HarvestersOfBounty.description: The resource yield of plant jobs is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_HarvestersOfBounty.label: Harvesters of Bounty
LanguageData.VFET_HealersOfSwiftHand.description: Medical tend speed is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_HealersOfSwiftHand.label: Healers of Swift Hand
LanguageData.VFET_KeepersOfThePasture.description: The yield of resources obtained from animal handling is increased by 15%.
LanguageData.VFET_KeepersOfThePasture.label: Keepers of the Pasture
LanguageData.VFET_LorekeepersTradition.description: Learning rate of all skills is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_LorekeepersTradition.label: Lorekeepers' Tradition
LanguageData.VFET_Marksmen.label: Marksmen
LanguageData.VFET_MasonsOfTheFuture.description: The speed of construction work is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_MasonsOfTheFuture.label: Masons of the Future
LanguageData.VFET_MasterButchers.description: Yield of resources obtained from butchering creatures is 10% higher.
LanguageData.VFET_MasterButchers.label: Master Butchers
LanguageData.VFET_MerchantsOfProsperity.label: Merchants of Prosperity
LanguageData.VFET_MortarVisionaries.description: Mortars fired by the colonists are 15% more accurate.
LanguageData.VFET_MortarVisionaries.label: Mortar Visionaries
LanguageData.VFET_NomadsOfAbundance.description: Travellers forage additional 0.3 nutrition per day.
LanguageData.VFET_NomadsOfAbundance.label: Nomads of Abundance
LanguageData.VFET_OrderoftheMendingHands.label: Order of the Mending Hands
LanguageData.VFET_PathOfSwiftWinds.label: Path of the Swift Winds
LanguageData.VFET_PhysiciansOfPrecision.description: Medical tend quality is improved by 5%.
LanguageData.VFET_PhysiciansOfPrecision.label: Physicians of Precision
LanguageData.VFET_ProtectorsOfOrder.description: Chance to successfully arrest someone is increased by 15%.
LanguageData.VFET_ProtectorsOfOrder.label: Protectors of Order
LanguageData.VFET_QuickdrawMasters.description: Aiming a ranged weapon takes 10% less time.
LanguageData.VFET_QuickdrawMasters.label: Quickdraw Masters
LanguageData.VFET_RitualOfQuickFeast.label: Ritual of Quick Feast
LanguageData.VFET_ScholarsOfProgress.label: Scholars of Progress
LanguageData.VFET_SeekersOfHiddenDepths.description: Deep drilling speed is increased by 15%.
LanguageData.VFET_SeekersOfHiddenDepths.label: Seekers of Hidden Depths
LanguageData.VFET_ShadowsOfTheHunt.label: Shadows of the Hunt
LanguageData.VFET_SowersOfAbundance.description: Plant work speed is increased by 15%.
LanguageData.VFET_SowersOfAbundance.label: Sowers of Abundance
LanguageData.VFET_StewardsOftheVein.description: The resource yield of mining jobs is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_StewardsOftheVein.label: Stewards of the Vein
LanguageData.VFET_SurgeonsOfExcellence.label: Surgeons of Excellence
LanguageData.VFET_TechScavengers.description: Yield of resources obtained from shredding mechanoids is 20% higher.
LanguageData.VFET_TechScavengers.label: Tech Scavengers
LanguageData.VFET_WalkersInColdShadows.description: Comfortable minimum temperature is 5 degrees lower.
LanguageData.VFET_WalkersInColdShadows.label: Walkers in Cold Shadows
LanguageData.VFET_WarriorsOfPrecision.description: Chance to hit a melee attack is improved by 5%.
LanguageData.VFET_WarriorsOfPrecision.label: Warriors of Precision
LanguageData.VFET_WayOfTheRestedSpirit.label: Way of the Rested Spirit
LanguageData.VFET_WhisperersOfMind.label: Whisperers of the Mind
LanguageData.VFET_WhisperersToTheWild.description: A chance to tame animals is increased by 10%.
LanguageData.VFET_WhisperersToTheWild.label: Whisperers to the Wild
